name: Blog
description: Blog post / article — content-heavy page for editorial content, news articles, announcements, how-to guides. Use when: the user asks for a 'blog post', 'article', 'news item', or describes a topic in narrative / editorial form. Skip when: the user wants a generic landing or info page (use `page`) or a product detail page (use `product`). Page settings: `header` is the visible H1 / post title (typically the article title); `hideBreadcrumbs` defaults to false — keep it false for blog posts so readers can navigate back to the blog index; `seoInfo` carries SEO meta (`pageTitle`, `metaKeywords`, `metaDescription`) — fill `metaDescription` if the user supplied a summary, otherwise leave empty for the editor to fill later.

response.selector: Object.keys(this.response).map(x => ({ ...this.item, ...this.response[x], key: x, request: undefined })).reduce((acc, x) => ({ ...acc, [x.key]: x }), {})
